name: Mistral AI
description: Full Mistral AI surface — chat, embeddings, vision, OCR, Voxtral audio (transcribe/speak), Codestral FIM, agents, moderation, files, and batch. 22 tools. Listed on the Official MCP Registry. Free Experiment tier: 1B tokens/month.
